ingredients.name: Nogi Shrine
ingredients.address: Nogi Shrine, 8 Chome-11-27 Akasaka, Minato City, Tokyo 107-0052, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The shrine grounds near this location appear in the tense confrontation scenes of episode 10, where Toman members regroup amid the escalating Christmas Showdown battle. The serene shrine setting contrasts sharply with the gang war unfolding around the characters.

ingredients.name: Daimon Gate
ingredients.address: Daimon Gate, Koyasan, 高野町 Koya, Ito District, Wakayama 648-0211, Japan

ingredients.name: Terakoya NINJA | Tea Ceremony and Ikebana in Tokyo
ingredients.localName: おかき処 寺子屋本舗 川崎大師店
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒108-0073 Tokyo, Minato City, Mita, 2 Chome−12−5 弘法寺 Kobo‑ji Temple Terakoya NINJA | Tea Ceremony and Ikebana in Tokyo

ingredients.name: United Nations University
ingredients.address: United Nations University, 5 Chome-53-70 Jingumae, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-8925, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The distinctive brutalist facade of the United Nations University building near Omotesando appears in episode 9 as a backdrop during character movement through the Shibuya area, a familiar landmark in the anime's Tokyo street scenes.

ingredients.name: Hakushaku Ikebukuro East Exit
ingredients.localName: 珈琲専門館 伯爵［池袋東口店］
ingredients.address: Hakushaku Ikebukuro East Exit, 1 Chome-18-23 Minamiikebukuro, Toshima City, Tokyo 171-0022, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This retro coffee shop near Ikebukuro East Exit is depicted in episode 5 as the setting for a key meeting scene, where characters discuss plans in the quiet booths away from the chaos of gang conflicts.

ingredients.name: Denny's Shibuya Koen-dori
ingredients.localName: デニーズ渋谷公園通り店
ingredients.address: Denny's Shibuya Koen-dori, ２階 1 Chome-16-3 Jinnan, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0041, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Denny's on Shibuya Koen-dori appears in episode 4 as a casual meeting spot where characters hash out plans, the mundane family restaurant setting emphasizing the contrast between ordinary teen life and Toman's gang world.

ingredients.name: Multipurpose Restroom
ingredients.localName: 臨港パーク南口トイレ

ingredients.name: Bus/Large Vehicle Parking Lot
ingredients.localName: パシフィコ横浜 バス・大型車駐車場

ingredients.name: Shibuya Brdg.
ingredients.address: Shibuya Brdg., 1-chōme-2 Hiroo, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0012, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Shibuya Bridge (渋谷橋) appears in episode 4 as a street-level backdrop during Takemichi's navigation through Shibuya, grounding the anime's gang territory scenes in the real Hiroo neighborhood.

ingredients.name: Kanda Ekidai 2 Bicycle
ingredients.address: Kanda Ekidai 2 Bicycle, 12, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 101-0044, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Kanda Station bicycle parking area is featured in the opening sequence, appearing as characters move through the city on their way to confrontations, a quiet slice of ordinary Tokyo life set against the dramatic events of the Christmas Showdown arc.

ingredients.name: Tofu Shokudou
ingredients.address: Tofu Shokudou, 恵比寿富士蔵ハイツ 1F 1 Chome-3-1 Ebisunishi, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0021, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This tofu restaurant near Ebisu West appears in the opening credits sequence, its warm storefront representing the everyday Tokyo atmosphere the anime layers beneath its intense gang drama.

ingredients.name: Maruko Bridge
ingredients.address: Maruko Bridge, Denenchofu, Nakahara Ward, Ota City, Tokyo 211-0001, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Maruko Bridge over the Tama River is the setting for a pivotal early episode 1 confrontation, where the sweeping riverside view frames Toman members as they brace for the coming clash with Black Dragon.

ingredients.name: Tsukiyama Park
ingredients.address: Tsukiyama Park, 2 Chome-8-4 Chidori, Ota City, Tokyo 146-0083, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Tsukiyama Park in Ota City appears in episode 1 as a neighborhood open space used by characters as a gathering point, its low-key suburban feel fitting Takemichi's south Tokyo surroundings.

ingredients.name: Shibuya REX
ingredients.address: Shibuya REX, Premier-Dogenzaka Bldg., 1 Chome-18-3 Dogenzaka, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0043, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Shibuya REX live music venue on Dogenzaka appears in episode 13 during the climactic Christmas Showdown resolution, its neon-lit facade part of the Shibuya nightscape as Toman's fate hangs in the balance.

ingredients.name: Nogi Park
ingredients.address: Nogi Park, 8 Chome-11-32 Akasaka, Minato City, Tokyo 107-0052, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Nogi Park, adjacent to Nogi Shrine, appears in episode 10 as an outdoor setting during the tense regrouping scenes of the Christmas battle arc, the park's quiet paths serving as a brief respite amid the gang war.

ingredients.name: Umihotaru PA
ingredients.type: サービスエリア / パーキング エリア
categories: サービスエリア / パーキング エリア
ingredients.address: 地先 海ほたる, Nakajima, Kisarazu, Chiba 292-0008, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Umihotaru highway rest stop on Tokyo Bay appears in episode 10 as a dramatic backdrop for a confrontation or escape scene, its isolated offshore location underscoring the high-stakes tension of the Christmas Showdown arc.

ingredients.name: Yebisu Garden Place
ingredients.localName: 恵比寿ガーデンプレイス
ingredients.type: ショッピング モール
categories: ショッピング モール
ingredients.address: 4 Chome-20-20 Ebisu, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0013, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Yebisu Garden Place near Ebisu appears in the opening credits, its European-style plaza and Christmas illuminations echoing the festive yet dangerous atmosphere of the Christmas Showdown arc.

ingredients.name: Yamashita Park
ingredients.address: 279 Yamashitacho, Naka Ward, Yokohama, Kanagawa 231-0023, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Yamashita Park along Yokohama's waterfront is the scene in episode 5 where characters meet against the backdrop of the bay, the park's open esplanade giving a sense of the wider world beyond the gang conflicts consuming Toman.

ingredients.name: Tatekawa Kasenjiki Park
ingredients.localName: 江東区立 竪川河川敷公園
ingredients.address: 6 Chome-33-10 Kameido, Koto City, Tokyo 136-0071, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Tatekawa Kasenjiki Park in Koto City appears in episode 4 as an outdoor confrontation ground, its long riverside strip providing space for Toman members to face off against rivals amid the escalating Black Dragon conflict.

ingredients.name: Shibuya Center-Gai Street
ingredients.address: Udagawachō, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0042, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Shibuya Center-Gai, the bustling pedestrian shopping street, is depicted in episode 10 as the commercial heart of gang territory, with characters moving through dense crowds on their way to the decisive Christmas battle.

ingredients.name: FabCafe Tokyo
ingredients.address: FabCafe Tokyo, 道玄坂ピア 1F 1 Chome-22-7 Dogenzaka, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0043, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: FabCafe Tokyo on Dogenzaka appears in episode 13 as a Shibuya street-level backdrop during the final movements of the Christmas Showdown arc, placing the resolution of Toman's battle in the recognizable Shibuya entertainment district.

ingredients.name: FamilyMart Shibuya Dogenzaka
ingredients.localName: ファミリーマート 渋谷道玄坂店
ingredients.address: FamilyMart, 1 Chome-19-9 Dogenzaka, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0043, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The FamilyMart on Dogenzaka appears in episode 13 as a streetscape detail during the climactic sequence, the convenience store's familiar sign grounding the intense gang showdown finale in everyday Tokyo.

ingredients.name: Mitsugi Park
ingredients.address: Mitsugi Park, 4 Chome-59-1 Maenocho, Itabashi City, Tokyo 174-0063, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Mitsugi Park (見次公園) in Itabashi appears in episode 12 as a quiet pond-side setting for a character exchange, the park's reflective atmosphere lending weight to a conversation ahead of the final Christmas battle.

ingredients.name: Kawasaki Daishi
ingredients.address: Kawasaki Daishi, 4-48 Daishimachi, Kawasaki Ward, Kawasaki, Kanagawa 210-8521, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Kawasaki Daishi (Heiken-ji Temple) is a prominently depicted location in episode 10, where characters visit or pass by the iconic temple during the tense events of the Christmas Showdown, the temple's grand Sanmon gate making it one of the most recognizable real-world sites in the season.

ingredients.name: Jungumae Court
ingredients.entityContext: This residential court area near Jingumae appears in episode 10 as a street-level setting during the Shibuya-area movements of Christmas Showdown, characters cutting through the back streets as the gang conflict reaches its peak.

ingredients.name: Hinokicho Park
ingredients.address: 9 Chome-7-9 Akasaka, Minato City, Tokyo 107-0052, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Hinokicho Park in Akasaka appears in episode 10, its tree-lined paths near the Nogi Shrine cluster serving as a transitional outdoor space during the multi-location Christmas Showdown battle sequence.

ingredients.name: GU Shibuya
ingredients.address: GU Shibuya, B1F-3F 32-13 Udagawacho, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0042, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The GU clothing store in Shibuya appears in episode 10 as part of the Shibuya commercial district backdrop, the familiar retail storefront marking the territory where Toman's Christmas battle plays out.

ingredients.name: Yoshinoya Harajuku Takeshita Exit
ingredients.localName: 吉野家 原宿竹下口店
ingredients.address: Yoshinoya, 1 Chome-17-1 Jingumae, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0001, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Yoshinoya gyudon shop at Harajuku Takeshita Exit appears in episode 10 as a street-level landmark near Jingumae, part of the recognizable Harajuku/Omotesando area that features in the wide-ranging Christmas Showdown arc scenes.
